# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Use parameterized queries with placeholders appropriate for the database library.
- Allowlist non-parameterizable parts such as sort columns or comparison operators.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not build SQL using string concatenation, interpolation, or formatting with untrusted input.
- Do not trust stored values if they can later be reused in dynamic SQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function generateReport(PDO $pdo, array $postData) {
    $allowedStatuses = ['active', 'inactive', 'pending', 'completed', 'cancelled'];
    $allowedCategories = ['sales', 'marketing', 'support', 'development', 'operations'];
    $allowedSortColumns = ['id', 'created_at', 'status', 'category', 'amount', 'title'];
    $allowedSortDirections = ['ASC', 'DESC'];
    
    $whereClauses = [];
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($postData['status']) && in_array($postData['status'], $allowedStatuses, true)) {
        $whereClauses[] = "status = :status";
        $params[':status'] = $postData['status'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['category']) && in_array($postData['category'], $allowedCategories, true)) {
        $whereClauses[] = "category = :category";
        $params[':category'] = $postData['category'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['date_from'])) {
        $dateFrom = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $postData['date_from']);
        if ($dateFrom !== false) {
            $whereClauses[] = "created_at >= :date_from";
            $params[':date_from'] = $dateFrom->format('Y-m-d 00:00:00');
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['date_to'])) {
        $dateTo = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $postData['date_to']);
        if ($dateTo !== false) {
            $whereClauses[] = "created_at <= :date_to";
            $params[':date_to'] = $dateTo->format('Y-m-d 23:59:59');
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['min_amount']) && is_numeric($postData['min_amount'])) {
        $whereClauses[] = "amount >= :min_amount";
        $params[':min_amount'] = floatval($postData['min_amount']);
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['max_amount']) && is_numeric($postData['max_amount'])) {
        $whereClauses[] = "amount <= :max_amount";
        $params[':max_amount'] = floatval($postData['max_amount']);
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['search_term'])) {
        $whereClauses[] = "(title LIKE :search_term OR description LIKE :search_term)";
        $params[':search_term'] = '%' . $postData['search_term'] . '%';
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['user_id']) && is_numeric($postData['user_id'])) {
        $whereClauses[] = "user_id = :user_id";
        $params[':user_id'] = intval($postData['user_id']);
    }
    
    $sql = "SELECT * FROM reports";
    
    if (!empty($whereClauses)) {
        $sql .= " WHERE " . implode(" AND ", $whereClauses);
    }
    
    $sortColumn = 'created_at';
    if (!empty($postData['sort_by']) && in_array($postData['sort_by'], $allowedSortColumns, true)) {
        $sortColumn = $postData['sort_by'];
    }
    
    $sortDirection = 'DESC';
    if (!empty($postData['sort_direction']) && in_array(strtoupper($postData['sort_direction']), $allowedSortDirections, true)) {
        $sortDirection = strtoupper($postData['sort_direction']);
    }
    
    $sql .= " ORDER BY " . $sortColumn . " " . $sortDirection;
    
    $limit = 100;
    if (!empty($postData['limit']) && is_numeric($postData['limit']) && $postData['limit'] > 0 && $postData['limit'] <= 1000) {
        $limit = intval($postData['limit']);
    }
    $sql .= " LIMIT :limit";
    
    $offset = 0;
    if (!empty($postData['offset']) && is_numeric($postData['offset']) && $postData['offset'] >= 0) {
        $offset = intval($postData['offset']);
        $sql .= " OFFSET :offset";
    }
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        if (is_int($value)) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, PDO::PARAM_INT);
        } elseif (is_float($value)) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, PDO::PARAM_STR);
        } else {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
    }
    
    $stmt->bindValue(':limit', $limit, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    if ($offset > 0) {
        $stmt->bindValue(':offset', $offset, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    }
    
    $stmt->execute();
    
    return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
}

function getReportSummary(PDO $pdo, array $postData) {
    $allowedStatuses = ['active', 'inactive', 'pending', 'completed', 'cancelled'];
    $allowedCategories = ['sales', 'marketing', 'support', 'development', 'operations'];
    
    $whereClauses = [];
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($postData['status']) && in_array($postData['status'], $allowedStatuses, true)) {
        $whereClauses[] = "status = :status";
        $params[':status'] = $postData['status'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['category']) && in_array($postData['category'], $allowedCategories, true)) {
        $whereClauses[] = "category = :category";
        $params[':category'] = $postData['category'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['date_from'])) {
        $dateFrom = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $postData['date_from']);
        if ($dateFrom !== false) {
            $whereClauses[] = "created_at >= :date_from";
            $params[':date_from'] = $dateFrom->format('Y-m-d 00:00:00');
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['date_to'])) {
        $dateTo = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $postData['date_to']);
        if ($dateTo !== false) {
            $whereClauses[] = "created_at <= :date_to";
            $params[':date_to'] = $dateTo->format('Y-m-d 23:59:59');
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['min_amount']) && is_numeric($postData['min_amount'])) {
        $whereClauses[] = "amount >= :min_amount";
        $params[':min_amount'] = floatval($postData['min_amount']);
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['max_amount']) && is_numeric($postData['max_amount'])) {
        $whereClauses[] = "amount <= :max_amount";
        $params[':max_amount'] = floatval($postData['max_amount']);
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['user_id']) && is_numeric($postData['user_id'])) {
        $whereClauses[] = "user_id = :user_id";
        $params[':user_id'] = intval($postData['user_id']);
    }
    
    $sql = "SELECT 
                COUNT(*) as total_count,
                SUM(amount) as total_amount,
                AVG(amount) as average_amount,
                MIN(amount) as min_amount,
                MAX(amount) as max_amount
            FROM reports";
    
    if (!empty($whereClauses)) {
        $sql .= " WHERE " . implode(" AND ", $whereClauses);
    }
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        if (is_int($value)) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, PDO::PARAM_INT);
        } elseif (is_float($value)) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, PDO::PARAM_STR);
        } else {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
    }
    
    $stmt->execute();
    
    return $stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
}

function getReportsByStatusBreakdown(PDO $pdo, array $postData) {
    $allowedCategories = ['sales', 'marketing', 'support', 'development', 'operations'];
    
    $whereClauses = [];
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($postData['category']) && in_array($postData['category'], $allowedCategories, true)) {
        $whereClauses[] = "category = :category";
        $params[':category'] = $postData['category'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['date_from'])) {
        $dateFrom = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $postData['date_from']);
        if ($dateFrom !== false) {
            $whereClauses[] = "created_at >= :date_from";
            $params[':date_from'] = $dateFrom->format('Y-m-d 00:00:00');
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['date_to'])) {
        $dateTo = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $postData['date_to']);
        if ($dateTo !== false) {
            $whereClauses[] = "created_at <= :date_to";
            $params[':date_to'] = $dateTo->format('Y-m-d 23:59:59');
        }
    }
    
    $sql = "SELECT 
                status,
                COUNT(*) as count,
                SUM(amount) as total_amount
            FROM reports";
    
    if (!empty($whereClauses)) {
        $sql .= " WHERE " . implode(" AND ", $whereClauses);
    }
    
    $sql .= " GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC";
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, PDO::PARAM_STR);
    }
    
    $stmt->execute();
    
    return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
}

function exportReportToCSV(PDO $pdo, array $postData) {
    $results = generateReport($pdo, $postData);
    
    if (empty($results)) {
        return false;
    }
    
    $filename = 'report_' . date('Y-m-d_His') . '.csv';
    
    header('Content-Type: text/csv');
    header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . $filename . '"');
    
    $output = fopen('php://output', 'w');
    
    fputcsv($output, array_keys($results[0]));
    
    foreach ($results as $row) {
        fputcsv($output, $row);
    }
    
    fclose($output);
    
    return true;
}

try {
    $pdo = new PDO('mysql:host=localhost;dbname=your_database;charset=utf8mb4', 'username', 'password', [
        PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
        PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
        PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES => false
    ]);
    
    $reports = generateReport($pdo, $_POST);
    $summary = getReportSummary($pdo, $_POST);
    $statusBreakdown = getReportsByStatusBreakdown($pdo, $_POST);
    
} catch (PDOException $e) {
    error_log('Database error: ' . $e->getMessage());
    die('An error occurred while generating the report.');
}

?>
